message:
feat(core): add vc_export bridge for vibe_cockpit session telemetry

Wraps the vibe_cockpit CLI via SubprocessBridge to export session
telemetry and agent metrics. Includes RobotEnvelope<T> for standardized
JSON output with degraded/cache-fallback signaling. All calls fail-open.

Feature-gated behind `vc-export` (depends on `subprocess-bridge`).
24 unit tests covering serde roundtrips, forward-compat, and fail-open.

Closes: ft-3lnx7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
